title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALAG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN BARRIO ALAG,
MUNICIPALITY OF BACO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO FELIX HERNANDEZ
COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1139 / 67 OG No. 37, 7237 (September 13, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6204, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ALAG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN BARRIO ALAG,

MUNICIPALITY OF BACO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO FELIX HERNANDEZ

COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Alag Community School in Barrio Alag, Municipality of Baco, Province of Oriental Mindoro, is hereby changed to Felix Hernandez Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
